clubs.objective: To act as the central governing body for all student-led initiatives — driving student engagement, leadership development, collaboration, and innovation while representing student voices to faculty and administration.

To empower students to learn, experiment, collaborate, and showcase the transformative potential of Generative AI — building technical expertise while fostering ethical and responsible adoption of AI technologies.

To create a future-ready innovation ecosystem where students explore and master cutting-edge technologies like robotics, drones, IoT, AR/VR, and cybersecurity — applying hands-on learning to solve real-world problems.

To ignite the entrepreneurial spirit in students by building a campus-based startup ecosystem — enabling them to transform ideas into ventures through structured programs, mentorship, competitions, and real-world experimentation.

To serve as the creative backbone of the institution by capturing, curating, and communicating campus life — training students in photography, videography, design, and storytelling while building and enhancing the institution's digital presence across all official communication channels.

To nurture creativity and promote artistic excellence by providing a structured platform for students to express themselves through drama, dance, music, and singing — and represent the institution at local, regional, national, and international levels.

To create a vibrant and inclusive sports culture where students can participate in physical activities, discover their sporting potential, and develop life skills such as teamwork, discipline, resilience, and leadership — across both competitive and recreational sports.
